uses.open_unlocked: open an unlocked door or container
uses.stow_retrieve_open: stow or retrieve an item from an open container
uses.pour_vial: pour the contents out of a vial

citation.quote: you can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial
The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.
The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds.
The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you
